item.text: {"id":"urn:kernel-v1:disruption","label":"disruption","synset":"urn:lexical-wn31:n-00554210","pattern":"InstanceSchema; DO event + causal interruption of ordinary activity","gloss":"An act that causes an existing arrangement to lose its usual order or continuity, thereby impeding the people or things involved from proceeding as before.","explication":{"schema":"kot-ast/1","frame":"InstanceSchema","referents":[{"index":1,"refKind":"SomethingRef"},{"index":2,"refKind":"SomeoneRef"}],"clauses":[{"type":"pred","pred":"DO","roles":{"agent":{"kind":"sp","det":"SOME","head":{"kind":"primeHead","prime":"SOMEONE"},"bind":2},"undergoer":{"kind":"ref","index":1}}},{"type":"op","op":"BECAUSE","args":[{"type":"pred","pred":"DO","roles":{"agent":{"kind":"ref","index":2},"undergoer":{"kind":"ref","index":1}}},{"type":"op","op":"NOT","args":[{"type":"op","op":"CAN","args":[{"type":"pred","pred":"DO","roles":{"agent":{"kind":"sp","quant":"MUCH~MANY","head":{"kind":"primeHead","prime":"PEOPLE"}}}}]}]}]}]},"references":[],"status":"draft","notes":"AST adequacy: lossy — the AST represents the genus as something someone does and the effect as many people being unable to do things, but it cannot encode the criterial loss of order or continuity itself."}
